Bash(python3 -c "
import re
with open\('curriculum-dashboard.html'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)
ids = re.findall\(r\\"id: \(\\d+\),.*?label: '\(\\d+\)'\\", content\)
mismatches = [\(i,l\) for i,l in ids if i != l]
print\(f'Total numeric lessons: {len\(ids\)}'\)
print\(f'Mismatches: {len\(mismatches\)}'\)
for i,l in mismatches:
    print\(f'  id={i} label={l}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import re
with open\('curriculum-dashboard.html'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)
ids = re.findall\(r\\"id: \(\\d+\),.*?label: '\(\\d+\)'\\", content, re.DOTALL\)
if not ids:
    # Try single line
    for line in content.split\('\\n'\):
        m_id = re.search\(r'id: \(\\d+\),', line\)
        m_lab = re.search\(r\\"label: '\(\\d+\)'\\", line\)
        if m_id and m_lab:
            if m_id.group\(1\) != m_lab.group\(1\):
                print\(f'MISMATCH: id={m_id.group\(1\)} label={m_lab.group\(1\)} in: {line.strip\(\)[:80]}'\)
    print\('Check complete'\)
")
